examples: At his home, after dinner, Gilbert uncorked a dusty bottle of Calvados.
He takes a bottle of Calvados from the mantelpiece and nods to me to grab the other.
Stir Calvados, apple juice and lemon juice together over ice and strain into glass.
Those bivalves were now swimming in a heavenly sea of cream, bacon and calvados.
When I got to my hotel, I must have looked distraught because the duty clerk offered me a snifter of Calvados and a fluffy towel.
